dealsynopsis: The company raised $2.5 million of venture funding from Vora Ventures in 2020. The funds will be used for the launch into the United States.
The company raised GBP 1 million of venture funding from Midven on March 8, 2024. The funds will be used by the company to expand and advance to meet global demand.
The company joined West Midlands Health Tech Innovation Accelerator on an undisclosed date. No equity or funding was exchanged as a result of this program.
The company raised an undisclosed amount of venture funding from Future Planet Capital in approximately March 2026.
The company joined Grow London as a part of seventh cohort of Grow London Global on March 16, 2026. No equity or funding was exchanged as a result of this program.
The company joined CyLon as part of cohort 3 on May 12, 2016.
The company joined Velocity Accelerator on March 3, 2020.

The company received an undisclosed amount of development capital from Future Planet Capital and Midven on September 15, 2021. The funds will be used to accelerate growth by increasing sales and marketing capacity, as well as multiple technical hires to strengthen depth and capability within the team.
The company joined Grow London on an undisclosed date. No equity or funding was exchanged as a result of this program.
The company joined Engine on an undisclosed date. No equity or funding was exchanged as a result of this program.

The company raised GBP 150,000 of venture funding from Midlands Engine Investment Fund and Future Planet Capital on September 10, 2020, putting the company's pre-money valuation at GBP 450,000. The funds will be used to continue business development and for further brand-awareness and the promotion of its message on the importance of sustainably-sourced energy.

The company raised GBP 75,000 of Series A venture funding from Future Planet Capital and UK Innovation & Science Seed Fund on July 8, 2021, putting the company's pre-money valuation at GBP 1.05 million.
The company raised an undisclosed amount of venture funding in the form of convertible debt from UK Innovation & Science Seed Fund, Future Planet Capital and Midven on June 9, 2022.

The company raised GBP 364,002 of Series C seed funding from Future Planet Capital, Midven and Midlands Engine Investment Fund on October 27, 2020, putting the company's pre-money valuation at GBP 2.16 million. The funds will be used to further exploit the development of the range of automated software tools, increase sales and marketing functions, and take on a number of new recruits.
The company joined as a part of Third Cohort on June 3, 2017.
The company received £53,028 of grant funding from Innovate UK on August 1, 2014.
The company received £49,139 of grant funding from Innovate UK on May 1, 2016.
The company received £74,759 of grant funding from Innovate UK on April 1, 2015.
The company received £149,978 of grant funding from Innovate UK on July 1, 2015.
The company received £50,614 of grant funding from Innovate UK on June 1, 2016.
The company received £190,829 of grant funding from Innovate UK on July 1, 2016.
The company received £93,798 of grant funding from Innovate UK on October 1, 2017.
The company received £174,529 of grant funding from Innovate UK on January 1, 2019.
The company received £517,910 of grant funding from Innovate UK on July 1, 2019.
The company received £48,228 of grant funding from Innovate UK on June 1, 2020.
The company joined London Office for Rapid Cybersecurity Advancement as a part of Third Cohort on June 3, 2019. No equity or funding was exchanged as a result of this program.
The company joined Airbus Group as a part of its First Cohort on July 24, 2024. No equity or funding was exchanged as a result of this program.
The company joined Advanced Propulsion Centre as apart of Mobilise Innovation Accelerator on July 13, 2025 and received GBP 180,000 in funding in the form of grant.

The company raised GBP 500,098 of venture funding from Midlands Engine Investment Fund, Midven, Future Planet Capital and UK Innovation & Science Seed Fund on November 12, 2021, putting the company's pre-money valuation at GBP 2.83 million. Investor Midven and Other undisclosed investors also participated in the round. The funds will be used optimise company's e-commerce platform and upgrade its production capabilities.
The company entered into administration on February 6, 2023.

The company raised GBP 624,728 of Series A venture funding in a deal led by Midven on September 27, 2022, putting the company's pre-money valuation at GBP 1.03 million. Future Planet Capital, Tiago Galvao, Conduit Connect and other undisclosed investors also participated in the round. The funds will be used to help combat global medicine shortages.
The company was in talks to receive an undisclosed amount of venture funding on September 27, 2022. Subsequently, the deal was cancelled.
The company received GBP 49,462 of grant funding from UK Innovation & Science Seed Fund in November 2022.

The company raised GBP 1.3 million through a combination of debt and venture funding on January 2, 2024, putting the company's pre-money valuation at GBP 3.56 million. Equity portion of GBP 1.150205 million was led by Midven with participation from other undisclosed investors. Debt portion of GBP 149,795 was provided by undisclosed lenders.
The company is reportedly seeking venture funding from undisclosed investors. Subsequently, the deal was cancelled.
The company joined Grow Digital Health Midlands as a part of its 2022 Cohort. No equity or funding was exchanged as a result of this program.
The company joined West Midlands Health Tech Innovation Accelerator on an undisclosed date. No equity or funding was exchanged as a result of this program.
The company was capitalized with GBP 525,000 in from friends and family in July 2021.

The company raised GBP 1.45 million of venture funding through a combination of debt and equity on July 13, 2023, putting the company's pre-money valuation at GBP 5.00 million. Equity portion of $1.372924 million was raised from Midven, Future Planet Capital and other undisclosed investors. Debt portion of $77,076 was provided by undisclosed lenders. The funds will be used for the growing demand for self-pay private elective surgery and to create 60 new jobs over the next three years will also use investment to complete the technology platform that supports Get Well Soon (GWS), the company's customer-facing brand.

The company raised GBP 1.45 million of venture funding from Midven and other undisclosed investors on September 4, 2025, putting the company's pre-money valuation at GBP 4.78 million. The funding will be used to diversify product offerings, and enter new markets along with expanding workforce.
